Court records show Travis, a registered sex offender, was on probation stemming from a 2008 federal conviction and a previous state conviction for sex-related crimes. Federal investigators responded to his home in April of this year after being tipped off that Travis was allegedly storing and sharing illicit images of minors. The 43-year-old was transported to a hospital and later taken into custody on an outstanding warrant and federal charges. He's expected back in court this summer.
